title: Unit vulnerableapp.service is UNSAFE
evidence: ProtectSystem= — Service has full write access to system directories (exposure 0.2)
fix_recipe: Set ProtectSystem=strict and declare explicit ReadWritePaths for the directories the service legitimately writes to.

title: Unit vulnerableapp.service is UNSAFE
evidence: PrivateTmp= — Service has access to other software's temporary files (exposure 0.2)

title: Unit vulnerableapp.service is UNSAFE
evidence: NoNewPrivileges= — Service processes may acquire new privileges (exposure 0.2)
fix_recipe: Add NoNewPrivileges=true to the [Service] block unless the service explicitly needs to drop privileges after setuid().

title: Unit vulnerableapp.service is UNSAFE
evidence: User=/DynamicUser= — Service runs as root user (exposure 0.4)
fix_recipe: Change User=root to a dedicated system user or set DynamicUser=true.

title: Unit vulnerableapp.service is UNSAFE
evidence: ReadWritePaths=/ — Service has full write access to filesystem (exposure 0.5)
fix_recipe: Replace ReadWritePaths=/ with the specific paths the service needs.

title: no-homepage-field
fix_recipe: Add a Homepage: field to debian/control pointing to the project's upstream page.

title: missing-vcs-browser-field
fix_recipe: Add Vcs-Git: and Vcs-Browser: fields to debian/control.

title: debian/postinst
fix_recipe: Add 'set -e' as the first executable line of debian/postinst.

title: usr/local/bin/vulnerableapp
fix_recipe: Remove the setuid bit via chmod 0755 and implement privilege separation in the service itself.
